steps.title: Use years after the start
steps.content: Let $t$ be the number of years after $1998$. Then the known points are $(0{,}60)$ and $(20{,}224)$, and $2022$ corresponds to $t=24$.

steps.title: Find the linear model
steps.content:
Find the slope from the known points:
$$
m=\frac{224-60}{20-0}=\frac{164}{20}=8.2
$$
Since the value at $t=0$ is $60$, the model is $y=8.2t+60$.

steps.title: Predict the later value
steps.content: Substitute $t=24$: $$ y=8.2(24)+60=256.8 $$ Rounded to the nearest whole number, this is $257$. The answer is 257.
